falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a potential reversal or blowoff top.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price makes a higher high on the S&P 500 while RSI < 30
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bearish divergence (price rising but RSI failing to confirm) would contradict the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern, proving the current verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of the Nasdaq crosses above the 50-day moving average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A bullish moving average crossover would indicate a confirmed trend shift, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' phase and 'HOLD' signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
